Class GeminiGoogleCloudExpressAIProvider

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractAiProvider
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.GeminiAiProvider
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.GeminiGoogleCloudExpressAIProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class GeminiGoogleCloudExpressAIProvider extends GeminiAiProvider
The concrete implementation of the AbstractAgiProvider for the Google Gemini API. This class manages the native Client instance and handles the discovery and listing of available Gemini models.
Author:
anahata-gemini-pro-2.5

  • Constructor Details

    • GeminiGoogleCloudExpressAIProvider

      public GeminiGoogleCloudExpressAIProvider()
      Constructs a new Gemini Express provider with the stable UUID 'GeminiGCExpress' and specialized Google Cloud acquisition URI.

  • Method Details

    • listModels

      public List<? extends AbstractModel> listModels()
      Fetches the list of all models available from the provider's API. This method is intended to be called by the caching mechanism.

      Implementation details: Synchronously fetches the list of available Generative Models from the Google GenAI service. Each native model is wrapped in a GeminiModel adapter.

      Implementation details: Returns a hardcoded manifest of HardcodedGeminiModel instances because Vertex Express mode does not support model discovery.

      Overrides:
      listModels in class GeminiAiProvider
      Returns:
      A list of provider-specific AbstractModel objects.

    • createModel

      private HardcodedGeminiModel createModel(String id, String name, String version, int inputLimit, int outputLimit)
      Internal factory method to create a HardcodedGeminiModel with pre-defined capabilities.
      Parameters:
      id - The model identifier.
      name - The display name.
      version - The version string.
      inputLimit - The context window limit.
      outputLimit - The single-turn output limit.
      Returns:
      A configured HardcodedGeminiModel.

    • getApiKeyHint

      public String getApiKeyHint()
      Gets a template or hint string to display when the API keys file is empty.

      Provides a template configuration for the Gemini api_keys.txt file.

      Provides a template configuration for the Gemini api_keys.txt file.

      Overrides:
      getApiKeyHint in class GeminiAiProvider
      Returns:
      The API key hint text.
